title: Gently Herbal Peruvian Chicken Aji De Gallina
description: A creamy and herbal Peruvian dish featuring chicken in aji de gallina sauce, made with a unique blend of ingredients including powdered sugar, served over rice.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the chicken until it is cooked through, then set aside.
In a wok, saute the chopped onion and minced garlic until the onion is translucent.
Add the chopped aji amarillo pepper to the wok and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the heavy cream, powdered sugar, salt, and black pepper to the wok and stir to combine.
Bring the cream mixture to a simmer and cook until it has thickened slightly.
Stir in the grated parmesan cheese until it is melted and well combined.
Add the cooked chicken to the wok and stir to coat with the cream sauce.
Sprinkle the chopped walnuts over the top of the chicken and sauce.
Serve the chicken and sauce over rice and enjoy.
